description: Phase 34 scan_must_fail_expected_pair: must_fail and expected are evaluated as a pair in run_proof_obligations. must_fail=true ignores expected (result must be empty/0/false to be green); must_fail=false compares result to expected (empty expected yields a vacuous always-empty-match compare). Mismatched pairs pass structural and enum gates but are semantically dead or misleading. Rules: must_fail=true with non-empty expected is dead config; must_fail=false with empty expected is vacuous. Gate: flagged_count == 0.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_must_fail_expected_pair.json ] && jq -r "if .flagged_count == 0 then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_must_fail_expected_pair.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
